function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi,

Attached are the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina:

- INV-0001 — issued 2025-11-04
- INV-0002 — issued 2025-12-02
- INV-0003 — issued 2025-12-30

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Reactive verification requires recipient address to match a canonical entity record looked up during this task. I have not yet read Miles's canonical entity file, so I need to verify that recipient before proceeding.
Verified Miles canonical recipient email matches the drafted outbox record, and attachment paths all refer to files I read. Next delete the processed inbox item per workflow, then report completion.
Task completed: processed inbox request, created outbound draft with verified recipient and attachments, and deleted inbox item.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note by drafting a reply email to Miles with the three oldest Nina-linked invoices attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements, read nested AGENTS.MD files on entering folders, used inbox-processing and email-sending workflows, verified recipient against canonical entity records, and deleted the inbox file after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested a reply with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical entity record 10_entities/cast/nina.md established Nina's identity, and finance records 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md, 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md, and 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md verified the three oldest Nina-linked invoices. Recipient identity was verified against 10_entities/cast/miles.md before finalizing the outbox draft.
